warnings: GRID DISAGREEMENT WITH t1: t1's independent read set grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation: true for this page (per the sibling t1 file บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า36_outlet_plan.json). My independent read finds this page uses the identical dimension string (matching the master grid หน้า00_gridline.json, including the A'/A'' dummy extension) as หน้า29 and หน้า35 -- see those files' warnings for the supporting evidence. Recommend grid_source-linked treatment.

Exact count and room-by-room placement of duplex outlets is only partially legible (several '+1.20M' labels are clustered close together); do not treat the outlet count implied here as a verified quantity without zooming into the source page.
This page also contains AC-circuit and telephone/antenna wiring notes, captured in the sibling file.
